title: Wine Goblet Set Baroque Embossed 300ml Wine Glasses Dishwasher Safe
seller_info_text: Dibor - French Style Accessories for the Home
features: Set of 4 high quality embossed glass wine goblets
Made from coloured glass with a vintage style baroque relief design
Each wine glass measures H17 x D9cm
Dishwasher safe, ideal for everyday use
description: Product Description 300ml Baroque Embossed Wine Goblets Made from high quality embossed glass with a stylish baroque relief design, this deluxe set of wine goblet mugs is the perfect way to enjoy a glass of wine whether eating in or dining alfresco all year round. Made from thick dishwasher safe glass, this glassware set is ideal for daily dining. About our glassware Ideal For Everyday Use Made from dishwasher safe embossed glass, these wine goblet glasses are perfect not only for special occasions but also everyday use. Embossed Details Beautifully decorated with a vintage style baroque embossed design perfect for bringing a hint of vintage style to the dining table. Footed Design Standing on a sturdy footed base ideal for storing glassware on shelves and in cupboards to prevent toppling when not in use. Mix & Match Available in an array of complimentary designs perfect for creating the perfect mix and match glassware collection. Finishing touches... Glass Tableware The perfect compliment to our glassware, complete your table settings with our exclusive Bella Perle glass crockery range, as used by Nigella Lawson and adorned with an iconic beaded edge design. Kitchen & Table Linen All made from 100% machine washable cotton, our range of sustainably sourced kitchen and table linen has a wide array of products and designs to suit every occasion and style. Tablescapes Add the finishing touches to the table with our specially designed tablescapes with everything from garlands and wreaths to table scatters to make your dining space that little bit more special. Candle Holders Illuminate the dining room or kitchen with our range of candle holders and lanterns suitable for everything from tea lights and votives to taper and pillar candles with designs and colour schemes to suit every style.
